name: Inventory Tracker
description: A stock-tracking dashboard ("Stockroom"): inventory stats, a live items table fetched from the data API with an add-item form, all in a dark-tech shell.
prompt: Build a stock-tracking dashboard called <name>: a top nav, a stats row (SKUs, low stock, total value), an items table fetched from the items collection with columns for SKU, name, quantity, and price, an add-item form that POSTs new rows and refreshes the table, and a footer.
